name: Tyrannosaurus Rex
description: The apex predator. Massive jaws, tiny arms, maximum attitude.

name: Triceratops
description: Three-horned gentle giant. Great for garden patrol.

name: Velociraptor
description: Highly intelligent pack hunter. Requires experienced owner.

name: Brachiosaurus
description: Tallest dino available. Eats treetops, very calm temperament.

name: Phuwiangosaurus
description: Rare Thai sauropod. Long neck, peaceful, eats 200 kg/day.

name: Ankylosaurus
description: Living tank with club tail. Nearly indestructible armor.

name: Pteranodon
description: Winged reptile. Not technically a dinosaur but we sell it anyway.

name: Spinosaurus
description: Larger than T-Rex, loves water. Semi-aquatic lifestyle.
